Package lu.kbra.p4j.socket.server

Class P4JServer

java.lang.Object
lu.kbra.p4j.socket.server.P4JServer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable, Runnable, P4JInstance, P4JInstance.P4JServerInstance, EventDispatcher
public class P4JServer extends Object implements P4JInstance.P4JServerInstance, EventDispatcher, Closeable, Runnable

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface lu.kbra.p4j.socket.P4JInstance

    P4JInstance.P4JClientInstance, P4JInstance.P4JClientServerInstance, P4JInstance.P4JServerClientInstance, P4JInstance.P4JServerInstance

    P4JServer(CodecManager codecManager, EncryptionManager encryptionManager, CompressionManager compressionManager)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    bind(InetSocketAddress inetSocketAddress)
    Binds the current server to the local address.
    void
    broadcast(Function<ServerClient,S2CPacket<?>> packetSupplier)
    Sends the packet provided by the supplier to all the connected clients.
    void
    broadcast(List<S2CPacket<?>> packets)
    Sends the packets to all the connected clients.
    void
    broadcast(S2CPacket<?> packet)
    Sends the packet to all the connected clients.
    void
    broadcastIf(Function<ServerClient,S2CPacket<?>> packetSupplier, Predicate<ServerClient> condition)
    Iterates over all the connected clients and sends the packet provided by the supplier, if the predicate's condition is met.
    void
    broadcastIf(List<S2CPacket<?>> packets, Predicate<ServerClient> condition)
    Iterates over all the connected clients and sends the specified packet(s) if the predicate's condition is met.
    void
    broadcastIf(S2CPacket<?> packet, Predicate<ServerClient> condition)
    Iterates over all the connected clients and sends the specified packet if the predicate's condition is met.
    void
    close()
    Closes the server socket.
    The server will no longer accept new client connections, all clients will be forcefully disconnected and the local port is released.
    void
    disconnectAll()
     
    void
    dispatchEvent(P4JEvent event)

    void
    setRefusing()
    Sets the server socket in client refuse mode.
    The server will refuse all future incoming client connections but keep current connections alive.

  • Field Details

    • MAX_PACKET_SIZE

      public static int MAX_PACKET_SIZE

  • Constructor Details

    • P4JServer

      public P4JServer(CodecManager codecManager, EncryptionManager encryptionManager, CompressionManager compressionManager)
      Default constructor for a P4JServer, creates a default ClientManager bound to this server instance.
      Parameters:
      codecManager - the server codec manager
      encryptionManager - the server encryption manager
      compressionManager - the server compression manager

  • Method Details

    • bind

      public void bind(InetSocketAddress inetSocketAddress) throws IOException
      Binds the current server to the local address.
      Parameters:
      inetSocketAddress - the local address to bind to
      Throws:
      IOException - if the ServerSocketChannel or Selector cannot be opened or bound
      P4JServerException - if the server is already bound

    • broadcast

      public void broadcast(Function<ServerClient,S2CPacket<?>> packetSupplier)
      Sends the packet provided by the supplier to all the connected clients.

    • broadcast

      public void broadcast(List<S2CPacket<?>> packets)
      Sends the packets to all the connected clients.

    • broadcast

      public void broadcast(S2CPacket<?> packet)
      Sends the packet to all the connected clients.

    • broadcastIf

      public void broadcastIf(Function<ServerClient,S2CPacket<?>> packetSupplier, Predicate<ServerClient> condition)
      Iterates over all the connected clients and sends the packet provided by the supplier, if the predicate's condition is met.

    • broadcastIf

      public void broadcastIf(List<S2CPacket<?>> packets, Predicate<ServerClient> condition)
      Iterates over all the connected clients and sends the specified packet(s) if the predicate's condition is met.

    • broadcastIf

      public void broadcastIf(S2CPacket<?> packet, Predicate<ServerClient> condition)
      Iterates over all the connected clients and sends the specified packet if the predicate's condition is met.

    • close

      public void close()
      Closes the server socket.
      The server will no longer accept new client connections, all clients will be forcefully disconnected and the local port is released.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Specified by:
      close in interface Closeable
      Throws:
      P4JServerException - if the server socket is already closed

    • disconnectAll

      public void disconnectAll()

    • getPort

      public int getPort()
      Returns:
      the local port bound to the server or -1 if the server is closed

      Specified by:
      run in interface Runnable

    • setAccepting

      public void setAccepting()
      Sets the server socket in client accept mode.
      The server will accept all future incoming client connections.
      Throws:
      P4JServerException - if the server socket is closed

      public void setClientManager(ClientManager clientManager)

    • setPackets

      public void setPackets(PacketManager packets)

    • setRefusing

      public void setRefusing()
      Sets the server socket in client refuse mode.
      The server will refuse all future incoming client connections but keep current connections alive.
      Throws:
      P4JServerException - if the server socket is closed.
